title: intracellular calcium assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"re8o","text":"This protocol was used for the experiment conducted in \" Sodium-calcium exchanger 1 is the key molecule for urinary potassium excretion against acute hyperkalemia\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e9f59","text":"Calcium Kit - Fluo 4  (Dojindo, Kumamoto, Japan)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7c46j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"86c2v","text":"- Fluo 4-AM ............................... 50 μg × 10","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ffr4q","text":"- Dimethylsulfoxide ...................2 ml × 1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fhoih","text":"- Recording Medium (2X) .......... 100 ml × 1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5g26j","text":"-Probenecid ...........                       1.3 ml × 1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a518s","text":"-5% Pluronic®  F-127 ................  2.5 ml × 1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bdg8f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"485tm","text":"35mm glass bottom dish (Iwaki, Shizuoka, Japan) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aqaua","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ag94j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Creation of Loading Buffer: solution A+ solution B ■Solution A 5ml Recording Buffer 50µl Probenesid 80μl Pluronic F-127 approximate 5 ml pure water (up to 10ml) ■Solution B 50 µl DMSO 50µℊ Fluo4 Loading Buffer should be heated at 37 ℃
Cultured cells in glass bottom dish should be washed with PBS, and replaced by 1.2 ml loading buffer. Then, Incubate at 37 °C for 1 hour. The drugs are added during this period.
Preparation for Recording Buffer while cells are incubated in loading buffer. ■Recording Buffer 5ml Recording Medium 50 μl Probenesid approximate 5ml pure water (up to 10ml)
After 1 hour incubation of loading buffer, the cells are washed with PBS , then replaced by 1.2 ml of recording buffer.

Following the administration of stimuli ( ex. 10mM KCl ), the fluorescence intensities of Fluo-4 are quantified from five regions of interest using LSM 510 Meta confocal microscopy and the ZEN 2009 software (Carl Zeiss, Oberkochen, Germany).
creator: Wakana Shoda
